edgren_influences.note: Edgren lists 'infer, conclude' as the primary senses of arguire, confirming the choice of 'so far as I could infer' over a modern default of 'argue' or 'gather'

edgren_influences.edgren_definition: con-sòrte [L. -sors (sors, fate)], M., F.: consort; partner
edgren_influences.note: Edgren's period-appropriate primary gloss 'consort' supported retaining this slightly archaic term in 'widowed consort' rather than modernising to 'wife' or 'spouse'; both drafts agreed on this rendering
Edgren confirms 'sufficient' as the direct equivalent of bastevole, supporting 'means more than sufficient' as the natural period rendering of 'mezzi più che bastevoli'
